description:
Your task is to generate a comprehensive Fleet Operations Summary Report by querying the Aerobridge database (/opt/aerobridge/aerobridge.sqlite3). The web admin panel does not provide a consolidated view, requiring a direct database query. Create a plain text file at /home/ga/Documents/fleet_summary.txt containing the following four sections:

=== OPERATORS ===: List every registered Company with its Name, Country, and count of assigned aircraft.
=== AIRCRAFT ===: List every registered Aircraft with its Manufacturer, Mass (kg), Operator Name, and Type Certificate status (Yes/No).
=== PERSONNEL ===: List every registered Person with their Full Name and associated Operator/Company Name.
=== SUMMARY ===: Show total counts for Operators, Aircraft, Persons, and Flight
